generated.findings: Calcified granuloma in the left upper lobe, mild right hemidiaphragm elevation with bronchovascular crowding, and indistinct vascular margination. No definite focal alveolar consolidation or pleural effusion.
generated.impression: Old granulomatous disease. No acute pulmonary disease.
generated.recommendation: Further evaluation not indicated at this time.
generated.disclaimer: Clinical uncertainty exists due to low agreement score (0.20) for the label 'Edema/Congestion'.

There is suspected right lower lobe airspace opacity [REDACTED] demonstrated on the lateral study. There is a fracture of superior sternotomy [REDACTED] unchanged.
